case_title: BURGESS, NATHAN VS INTERGRATED PAYMENT SYSTEM INC.

docket_entries.description: CERT MAIL SENT TO CSC-LAWYERS INC SERVICES AGENT FOR PROCESS OF SERVICE INTEGRATED PAYMENT SERVICES INC RETURNED SIGNED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY BURGESS, NATHAN AS TO DEFENDANT INTERGRATED PAYMENT SYSTEM INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-08-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURGESS, NATHAN HEARING SET FOR NOV-28-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT CONTINUED FROM NOV-28-2005 TO DEC-22-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURGESS, NATHAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT INTERGRATED PAYMENT SYSTEM INC. $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $32.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,032.00, AWARD REDUCED DUE TO PLAINTIFF'S NEGLIGENCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION SEP-08-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-07-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE INFORMATION TO DEFENDANT AND DEFENDANT TO CONDUCT INVESTIGATION. CASE TO BE CONSIDERED OR RESOLVED ON A MORE COMPLETE RECORD.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-07-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-20-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 COMMISSIONER ROSEN-PARK RECUSES HERSELF FFROM THIS CASE. CONTINUED FOR FURTHER TRIAL.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BURGESS, NATHAN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT INTERGRATED PAYMENT SYSTEM INC. PLTF FAILED TO APPEAR. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF DEC-22-2005, GRANTED
